pages.text: A true mountain — a tall, peaked Rocky island that rises well above its rim, far larger and richer than the standard isle.

$(bold)Mountain riches$()$(br)The deep core carries the full Rocky ore suite, and being a mountain it also yields $(item)emerald ore$() — the reliable source for the trading economy. Goats roam the heights.
$(bold)Snow-capped$()$(br)Thrown high or over a snowy biome it generates as a snow-capped alpine peak; otherwise bare stone and scree.
